payload.author: claude
payload.body: DONE (subagent + integrated). ensureRls(pool) wired into cloud boot after ensureSchema. All 6 tenant tables ENABLE+FORCE RLS; uploadEvents/pullEvents/snapshotState/pgReplay run inside withTenant. PROD REQUIREMENT: the docker/test user is superuser (bypasses RLS), so set SCOPE_PG_APP_ROLE to a non-superuser role on Fly for the defense-in-depth to bind - ensureRls grants it the needed table privileges automatically. Proven in test/pg-rls-live.test.js: no-WHERE queries in tenant-A context see only A rows; cross-tenant INSERT rejected by WITH CHECK; FORCE verified.
